name: com.homam.uiwidgets
description: General-purpose Unity UGUI widget library: modal dialogs, virtualized scroll lists, enhanced buttons (ButtonX), context menus, tabs, sliders, card UI, tooltips, toasts, procedural graphic primitives, UI effects, and an in-house layout engine (LayoutX). Built on FoundationPlatform.

samples.description: Manual demo scene component exercising InputDialog (basic, validated, keyboard shortcuts).
